for AI Startup

03

Residential · Keelung, Taipei

Residential
Keelung

Complex residential project in Keelung requiring detailed section studies through challenging hillside topography. BIM documentation included multi-basement parking levels stepping down with grade, residential floor plans, and coordination with structural elements. LOD 200/300 delivery.

Location Keelung, Taipei
LOD 200 / 300
Type Residential
04

Community Residential · Taichung

Community
Residential, Taichung

Low-rise community residential development set within a landscaped river-adjacent site. Coordinated eight villa-type building clusters (M-1 through M-8) and a central community facility. The scheme integrates naturalistic Japanese-influenced architecture with thoughtful site circulation and waterfront amenities.

Location Taichung
Scale 8 Clusters
LOD 200 / 300
05

Office High-Rise · Taipei

Office Tower
Taipei

High-rise office building in Taipei delivered at LOD 300, requiring detailed floor plan documentation with full room data, façade curtain wall coordination, and comprehensive annotation in Traditional Chinese and English. Elevation sheets coordinated with structural grid across all floors.

Location Taipei
LOD 300
Type Office High-Rise
06

Office High-Rise · Kaohsiung

Office Tower
Kaohsiung

Large-scale office high-rise in Kaohsiung with multi-floor plan documentation spanning typical office floors and podium retail levels. Deliverables include paired north/south elevation sheets, phased floor plan sets with red-line coordination markups, and complete sheet set management in Revit.

Location Kaohsiung
Type Office High-Rise
Scope Full Sheet Set
